name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Frozen Bars
recipeIngredient: 2 packages chocolate pudding mix, sugar free
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix pudding according to package directions, using 3 1/3 cups skim milk. Beat in peanut butter.
2. Line a 9x13 inch pan with half of the Graham cracker squares. If necessary, cut some squares in half.
3. Spread the pudding mixture over the Graham crackers. Top with the remaining crackers.
4. Freeze for four hours. Cut into squares and remove from the pan. Store in a plastic bag.
